## Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of the changes you're proposing.

## Type of Change
Please check the relevant option:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues
Please link any related issues or feature requests:
- Fixes #(issue number)
- Relates to #(issue number)

## Changes Made
Please describe the changes you've made:
- [ ] Frontend changes (TypeScript/React)
- [ ] Backend changes (Go)
- [ ] API integration updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Test updates

## Testing
Please describe the testing you've done:
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested with Grafana version: _____
- [ ] Tested with UpDown.io API

## Testing Checklist
- [ ] Plugin builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Backend compiles without errors (`mage build`)
- [ ] Plugin can be loaded in Grafana
- [ ] Data source configuration works
- [ ] Queries return expected data
- [ ] Error handling works correctly

## Screenshots/Videos
If applicable, add screenshots or videos to demonstrate your changes.

## Backward Compatibility
- [ ] This change is backward compatible
- [ ] This change requires migration/upgrade steps
- [ ] This is a breaking change

If this is a breaking change, please describe the impact and migration path.

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated README.md if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Updated inline code comments
- [ ] Updated API documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes

## Additional Notes
Any additional information, concerns, or notes for reviewers.
